mapper.select:
select t.*,d.name oper_type_text,u.name operatorid_text,d1.name status_text from sys_log t left join user u on t.operatorid=u.id left join dictionary d on t.opertype=d.value and d.dictkey='oper_type' and d.level=2 left join dictionary d1 on t.status=d1.value and d1.dictkey='oper_status' and d1.level=2 where t.opertype !=5 and t.client_id is null and t.errormsg is null
and t.module like concat('%'+#{condition.module}+'%')
and u.name like concat('%'+#{condition.operator}+'%')
and t.opertype =#{condition.opertype}
and t.createtime between
#{item}
order by t.createtime desc
